title: crotalaria namuliensis
intro: Crotalaria namuliensis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae), native to Mozambique. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria namuliensis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a remedy for wounds and skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create a tonic or salve.
